'''rangolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scainiite|scainiite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scainiite|scainiite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rangolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rængeleth|rængeleth]] || [[word:rængelej|rængelej]] || [[word:rængelesh|rængelesh]] || [[word:rængele|rængele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rangongoloth|rangongoloth]] || [[word:rangongoloj|rangongoloj]] || [[word:rangongolosh|rangongolosh]] || [[word:rangongolo|rangongolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rangoloth|rangoloth]] || [[word:rangoloj|rangoloj]] || [[word:rangolosh|rangolosh]] || [[word:rangolo|rangolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rangofloth|rangofloth]] || [[word:rangofloj|rangofloj]] || [[word:rangoflosh|rangoflosh]] || [[word:rangoflof|rangoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rangolotho|rangolotho]] || [[word:rangolojo|rangolojo]] || [[word:rangolosho|rangolosho]] || [[word:rangoloko|rangoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rangoloth|rangoloth]] || [[word:rangoloj|rangoloj]] || [[word:rangolosh|rangolosh]] || [[word:rangolo|rangolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rangolothol|rangolothol]] || [[word:rangolojol|rangolojol]] || [[word:rangoloshol|rangoloshol]] || [[word:rangolokol|rangolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rangolothotho|rangolothotho]] || [[word:rangolojojo|rangolojojo]] || [[word:rangoloshosho|rangoloshosho]] || [[word:rangoloko|rangoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rangolothon|rangolothon]] || [[word:rangolojon|rangolojon]] || [[word:rangoloshon|rangoloshon]] || [[word:rangolokon|rangolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rangolothoro|rangolothoro]] || [[word:rangolojoro|rangolojoro]] || [[word:rangoloshoro|rangoloshoro]] || [[word:rangolokoro|rangolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
